summary: Completed comprehensive testing of match cards redesign. New clean layout successfully implemented with prediction bars, PREDICT MATCH button, and all required functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/football/matches returns match data with proper structure
Match cards display new clean layout with date/time/competition top row
Team names shown in uppercase/bold with crests and VS in center
Three prediction bars (1:, X:, 2:) display with percentage values
Social proof shows user count correctly
PREDICT MATCH button present with correct data-testid='guess-it-btn'
Clicking prediction bars selects options and provides visual feedback
PREDICT MATCH button becomes active after prediction selection
Auth modal appears correctly when trying to predict without login
Tab navigation works (Top Matches, Popular, Top Live, Soon, Ended)
Advanced link opens advanced options modal
All interactive elements are clickable and responsive
